evidence.claim: The system automatically reassigns affected flights to alternative runways.
evidence.fact: When a runway is closed, the system reassigns its future flights to the other runway.
evidence.user_story_span: automatically reassigning affected flights to alternative runways
evidence.fact_span: reassigns its future flights to the other runway

evidence.claim: The system marks affected flights with appropriate delays.
evidence.fact: The slot timetable includes delayed flights.

evidence.claim: The system processes a runway closure when it is declared.
evidence.fact: When a runway is closed, the system reassigns its future flights to the other runway.

evidence.claim: The system adjusts departure and arrival times according to the delay.
evidence.fact: When an emergency is declared, the system instantly frees up a slot and reorders other flights to accommodate it.
evidence.user_story_span: Delay marking adjusts estimated departure/arrival times accordingly
